verses.text: He preaches the kingdom with the twelve, and women who minister of their substance. Faithful supporters. Grateful women help sustain His ministry.
He preaches the kingdom with the twelve, and women who minister of their substance. Faithful supporters. Grateful women help sustain His ministry.
He preaches the kingdom with the twelve, and women who minister of their substance. Faithful supporters. Grateful women help sustain His ministry.
A sower scatters seed on wayside, rock, thorns, and good ground, which bears a hundredfold. Varied soils. The same word meets very different hearts.
A sower scatters seed on wayside, rock, thorns, and good ground, which bears a hundredfold. Varied soils. The same word meets very different hearts.
A sower scatters seed on wayside, rock, thorns, and good ground, which bears a hundredfold. Varied soils. The same word meets very different hearts.
A sower scatters seed on wayside, rock, thorns, and good ground, which bears a hundredfold. Varied soils. The same word meets very different hearts.
A sower scatters seed on wayside, rock, thorns, and good ground, which bears a hundredfold. Varied soils. The same word meets very different hearts.
To the disciples it is given to know the mysteries, but to others in parables. Hidden and revealed. The word opens or closes by the hearer's heart.
To the disciples it is given to know the mysteries, but to others in parables. Hidden and revealed. The word opens or closes by the hearer's heart.
The seed is the word; the good ground are they who 'keep it, and bring forth fruit with patience.' Patient fruit. The honest heart holds the word and bears lasting fruit.
The seed is the word; the good ground are they who 'keep it, and bring forth fruit with patience.' Patient fruit. The honest heart holds the word and bears lasting fruit.
The seed is the word; the good ground are they who 'keep it, and bring forth fruit with patience.' Patient fruit. The honest heart holds the word and bears lasting fruit.
The seed is the word; the good ground are they who 'keep it, and bring forth fruit with patience.' Patient fruit. The honest heart holds the word and bears lasting fruit.
The seed is the word; the good ground are they who 'keep it, and bring forth fruit with patience.' Patient fruit. The honest heart holds the word and bears lasting fruit.
No candle is lit to be hidden; 'take heed... how ye hear,' for to him that hath shall be given. Use the light. The word received grows; neglected, it is lost.
No candle is lit to be hidden; 'take heed... how ye hear,' for to him that hath shall be given. Use the light. The word received grows; neglected, it is lost.
No candle is lit to be hidden; 'take heed... how ye hear,' for to him that hath shall be given. Use the light. The word received grows; neglected, it is lost.
His mother and brethren come; 'my mother and my brethren are these which hear the word... and do it.' Family of faith. Obedience binds us closest to Christ.
His mother and brethren come; 'my mother and my brethren are these which hear the word... and do it.' Family of faith. Obedience binds us closest to Christ.
His mother and brethren come; 'my mother and my brethren are these which hear the word... and do it.' Family of faith. Obedience binds us closest to Christ.
A storm rises; He rebukes the wind and water; 'Where is your faith?' Lord of the storm. Wind and sea obey, and faith is gently rebuked.
A storm rises; He rebukes the wind and water; 'Where is your faith?' Lord of the storm. Wind and sea obey, and faith is gently rebuked.
A storm rises; He rebukes the wind and water; 'Where is your faith?' Lord of the storm. Wind and sea obey, and faith is gently rebuked.
A storm rises; He rebukes the wind and water; 'Where is your faith?' Lord of the storm. Wind and sea obey, and faith is gently rebuked.
A man with devils, Legion, dwells among the tombs and falls before Jesus. Utter bondage. Sin's power leaves a man wretched and wild.
A man with devils, Legion, dwells among the tombs and falls before Jesus. Utter bondage. Sin's power leaves a man wretched and wild.
A man with devils, Legion, dwells among the tombs and falls before Jesus. Utter bondage. Sin's power leaves a man wretched and wild.
The devils beg not to be sent to the deep. Trembling foes. The powers of darkness dread the word of Christ.
The devils beg not to be sent to the deep. Trembling foes. The powers of darkness dread the word of Christ.
The devils beg not to be sent to the deep. Trembling foes. The powers of darkness dread the word of Christ.
They enter the swine, which drown; the man is found 'clothed, and in his right mind.' Restored. Christ gives back reason, peace, and dignity.
They enter the swine, which drown; the man is found 'clothed, and in his right mind.' Restored. Christ gives back reason, peace, and dignity.
They enter the swine, which drown; the man is found 'clothed, and in his right mind.' Restored. Christ gives back reason, peace, and dignity.
They enter the swine, which drown; the man is found 'clothed, and in his right mind.' Restored. Christ gives back reason, peace, and dignity.
They enter the swine, which drown; the man is found 'clothed, and in his right mind.' Restored. Christ gives back reason, peace, and dignity.
The fearful people beg Him to depart; 'shew how great things God hath done'; he publishes it. A witness sent. The healed becomes a herald of mercy.
The fearful people beg Him to depart; 'shew how great things God hath done'; he publishes it. A witness sent. The healed becomes a herald of mercy.
The fearful people beg Him to depart; 'shew how great things God hath done'; he publishes it. A witness sent. The healed becomes a herald of mercy.
Jairus pleads for his dying daughter; the crowd throngs Him. Humble plea. Need brings a ruler low before Christ.
Jairus pleads for his dying daughter; the crowd throngs Him. Humble plea. Need brings a ruler low before Christ.
Jairus pleads for his dying daughter; the crowd throngs Him. Humble plea. Need brings a ruler low before Christ.
A woman with an issue touches His garment and is healed; 'Who touched me? ... virtue is gone out of me.' Faith's touch. The lightest touch of faith draws His power.
A woman with an issue touches His garment and is healed; 'Who touched me? ... virtue is gone out of me.' Faith's touch. The lightest touch of faith draws His power.
A woman with an issue touches His garment and is healed; 'Who touched me? ... virtue is gone out of me.' Faith's touch. The lightest touch of faith draws His power.
A woman with an issue touches His garment and is healed; 'Who touched me? ... virtue is gone out of me.' Faith's touch. The lightest touch of faith draws His power.
She falls trembling and tells all; 'Daughter... thy faith hath made thee whole; go in peace.' Faith owned. He will not let her healing go unblessed.
She falls trembling and tells all; 'Daughter... thy faith hath made thee whole; go in peace.' Faith owned. He will not let her healing go unblessed.
Word comes the child is dead; 'Fear not: believe only, and she shall be made whole.' Faith in death. He bids the father trust Him still.
Word comes the child is dead; 'Fear not: believe only, and she shall be made whole.' Faith in death. He bids the father trust Him still.
He takes three disciples and the parents; 'she is not dead, but sleepeth'; they laugh. Scorned word. Unbelief mocks the hope it needs.
He takes three disciples and the parents; 'she is not dead, but sleepeth'; they laugh. Scorned word. Unbelief mocks the hope it needs.
He takes three disciples and the parents; 'she is not dead, but sleepeth'; they laugh. Scorned word. Unbelief mocks the hope it needs.
He takes her hand, 'Maid, arise'; her spirit returns; He charges silence. Death undone. At His word the dead child lives.
He takes her hand, 'Maid, arise'; her spirit returns; He charges silence. Death undone. At His word the dead child lives.
